verdicts.title: Bearer `exp` is never verified on the HMAC path
verdicts.note: verify_identity_token (backend_facade/auth.py:382-412) has zero expiry logic (grep 'exp' hits only docstring auth.py:177) and sid-less bearers skip the touch fallback at auth.py:256-260, so expired/sid-less bearers pass on authenticate_request routes (auth.py:622-818) indefinitely.

verdicts.title: REQUIRE_SESSION_BINDING kill-switch implemented but enabled nowhere
verdicts.note: Repo-wide the string appears only in the contract (auth_claims.py:24), the facade (auth.py:20,401,490,621), and tests; no deploy artifact sets it (deploy/self-host/docker-compose.prod.yml and apps/desktop/main/services/service-env.ts have no SESSION_BINDING).

verdicts.title: Two parallel dev-mint implementations with divergent security semantics
verdicts.note: POST /v1/dev/identity/mint signs directly with no session row/sid and 365-day TTL (dev_idp/routes.py:35,111-164) while SessionService.dev_mint mints a real 24h session (identity/sessions.py:257-280); frontend devIdpApi.ts:51, desktop oidc-client.ts:113, and Makefile:124 all use the former.

verdicts.title: HMAC bearer codec hand-implemented three times, twice in the same service
verdicts.note: Facade _sign/_b64encode/verify_identity_token (backend_facade/auth.py:382-412,501-513), backend _BearerCodec (identity/sessions.py:88-141), and dev_idp/_sign.py:22-38 are three separate HMAC-SHA256 codecs, two of them inside services/backend.

verdicts.title: SIWE EIP-4361 template is an SSOT violation across three files and two languages
verdicts.note: Template triplicated at siweMessage.ts:29-41, siwe.py:290-302, local-login.ts:78-91 plus statement 'Sign in to Copilot' at siweMessage.ts:16 / siwe.py:69 / local-login.ts:27, all with 'change all three together' comments; strict parser siwe.py:315-451 rejects drift and siweMessage.test.ts:52,68 pins only the frontend copy.

verdicts.title: Hand-rolled token + SIWE primitives where maintained libraries exist
verdicts.note: Bearer is hand-rolled HMAC even though pyjwt[crypto] is already a direct dep (requirements.in:23, used in identity/jwks.py); the ~140-line EIP-4361 parser (siwe.py:315-451) exists with no 'siwe' PyPI dep, and _TouchCache (auth.py:95-172) is a hand-rolled TTL-LRU with no cachetools dep.

verdicts.title: Dev-mode identity fallbacks trust caller-supplied identity
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per protocol; dev-only fallbacks fail closed under *_ENVIRONMENT=production.

verdicts.title: One deployment fact, three env vars
verdicts.note: BACKEND_ENVIRONMENT (backend_app/auth.py:99), RUNTIME_ENVIRONMENT (runtime_api/auth.py:127), and FACADE_ENVIRONMENT (backend_facade/auth.py:486) each default to 'development' and are read independently; prod artifacts set all three (docker-compose.prod.yml:116,157,222; service-env.ts:174,195,236) but no code cross-checks consistency.

verdicts.title: Frontend SIWE orchestration duplicated between WalletSignIn and LoginScreen
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per protocol.

verdicts.title: auth_routes.py is a 974-line hand-proxy with three per-route auth conventions
verdicts.note: LOW severity accepted as-is per protocol; the three auth conventions (authenticate_request / verify_with_touch / _anonymous_service_headers) are confirmed present via grep of auth_routes.py.
